specs.title: cp-000: 209 Slide transitions match presenter transitions
cp-001: 2115 Each action sends request to apipresentationsedit-slide
cp-002: 2116 Modified content blocks replace current blocks on success
cp-003: 2117 Loading indicator shown during AI processing
cp-004: 2118 Error message displayed on failure
cp-005: 2222 Theme picker renders preview swatches for all themes
cp-006: 2223 Selecting a theme applies it to the entire deck
cp-007: 2224 Theme change is reflected in sidebar thumbnails
cp-008: 2225 Custom themes are supported and persistable
cp-009: 231 Accepts title 1-500 chars preprocessedData 1-200k audienceType
cp-010: 232 Optional params slideCount themeKey
cp-011: 233 Uses model claude-sonnet-4-20250514
cp-012: 234 Returns generated deck structure
cp-013: 235 Validates title length 1-500
cp-014: 236 Validates preprocessedData length 1-200k
cp-015: 237 Returns 400 on invalid input
cp-016: 238 Accepts sourceType and data payload
cp-017: 239 Streams response back to client
cp-018: 2310 Handles all 7 source types papersdocumenttextdeep_researchreferencesurlimpo
cp-019: 2311 Accepts deckId command 1-2000 chars slides 1-100
cp-020: 2312 Returns modifiedSlides array and summary string
cp-021: 2313 Validates command length 1-2000
cp-022: 2314 Validates slides count 1-100
cp-023: 2315 Accepts slides for evaluation
cp-024: 2316 Returns CoachEvaluation with overall score and 5 dimensions
cp-025: 2317 Accepts difficulty focusAreas conversationHistory
cp-026: 2318 Returns question answer evaluation follow-ups
cp-027: 2319 Accepts action and contentBlocks
cp-028: 2320 Returns modified content blocks
cp-029: 2321 Uses model claude-haiku-4-5-20251001
cp-030: 241 deckId -- tracks active deck identifier
cp-031: 242 slides -- array of slide objects
cp-032: 243 activeSlideId -- currently selected slide
cp-033: 244 themeKey -- selected theme identifier
cp-034: 245 themeConfig -- resolved theme configuration
